# K-Ai Storage Saver

> Recover storage safely on Android. K-Ai compresses photos and videos while protected originals stay in the Safe Vault, so you can free space without losing quality.

K-Ai Storage Saver is a mobile-first Android utility that scans device storage, recommends safe recoveries, compresses photos and videos, and keeps originals in a time-boxed Safe Vault so every action is reversible.

## Pages

- [Home](/): App splash and entry point.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Introduction to K-Ai and how safe recovery works.
- [Privacy Policy](/settings/privacy): How K-Ai handles data on-device.
- [Terms of Use](/settings/terms): Terms governing use of the app.
- [About K-Ai](/settings/about): About the project and its mission.

## Optional

- [Changelog](/settings/changelog): Release notes.
- [Open source licenses](/settings/licenses): Third-party licenses.
